---
title: Separating the Mechanisms of Transient Responses to Stratospheric Ozone Depletion–Like
  Cooling in an Idealized Atmospheric Model
pagetitle: 2015-2-1-Yang2014b - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2015
author: Huang Yang, Lantao Sun and Gang Chen
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 72, 763--773, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-13-0353.1.
recommended_citation: 'Huang Yang, Lantao Sun and Gang Chen, 2015: Separating the
  Mechanisms of Transient Responses to Stratospheric Ozone Depletion–Like Cooling
  in an Idealized Atmospheric Model, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 72,
  763--773, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-13-0353.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/10.1175/JAS-D-13-0353.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Separating the Mechanisms of Transient Responses to Stratospheric Ozone Depletion–Like Cooling in an Idealized Atmospheric Model

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2015*

**Recommended citation:** Huang Yang, Lantao Sun and Gang Chen, 2015: Separating the Mechanisms of Transient Responses to Stratospheric Ozone Depletion–Like Cooling in an Idealized Atmospheric Model, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 72, 763--773, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-13-0353.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/10.1175/JAS-D-13-0353.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
